description: A Graphic Designer creates visual content to communicate ideas, messages, and brand identities through digital and print media. They use design principles, creativity, and software tools to produce logos, posters, social media graphics, advertisements, illustrations, and marketing materials.
roadmap: Work on Freelance or Real Client Projects
